when_to_use: Use for compact backend filter bars where Select is used as a query criterion.
when_not_to_use: Do not use a visible native select as the primary UI shell for Sanofi Elements pages.

state_contract.default: border uses neutral table border token and text uses default text token
state_contract.hover: border color may strengthen to semantic border default
state_contract.disabled: unsupported in this profile unless declared in template data

accessibility.labeling: Visible value must be associated with an sr-only label through aria-labelledby.
accessibility.native_semantics: Hidden native select may exist only as semantic fallback and must not be the visual shell.
